name: Snack Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, cream the butter and sugar together until light and fluffy.
2. Beat in the egg.
3. Combine the flour, baking powder, and salt in another bowl.
4. In a separate bowl, mix the buttermilk and vanilla extract.
5. Add the dry ingredients to the creamed mixture alternately with the buttermilk mixture; mix well.
6. Fold in the marshmallows and chocolate chips.
7. Pour the batter into a greased and floured 13x9x2-inch baking pan.
8. Combine the topping ingredients (walnuts, brown sugar, and melted butter) in another bowl.
9. Sprinkle the topping over the batter.
10. Bake at 350°F for 30-35 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
